title: Mechanical
contentHtml:
Vendor Directory Related Information

" MCF Vendor Directory is available on UVAM Portal under the IREPS website i.e. https://ireps.gov.in/ "

Vendors Interested for Upgradation of their Status in Vendor Directory of MCF shall apply through  UVAM portal  available on IREPS

 

Procedure for Prototype and Sample approval 

 Information regarding CCA by RITES

Format of application for CCA

List of documents (Annexure-II) to be submitted by firm to RITES for scrutiny

List of M&P,QAP and Testing Requirements ( Annexure-III A)

Format of assessment report to be submitted by RITES

RITES Contact Details:   Sh Ashwini Kumar- JGM-NRIO

MOB no- 8770140003 Email ID- ashwanikumar@rites.com

Time line for carrying out CCA by RITES

QAP Related Information

1. Guidelines for Preparing QAP

2. Format of QAP
contentMarkdown:
**Vendor Directory Related Information**

**" MCF Vendor Directory is available on UVAM Portal under the IREPS website i.e. [https://ireps.gov.in/](https://ireps.gov.in/) "**

Vendors Interested for Upgradation of their Status in Vendor Directory of MCF shall apply through  UVAM portal  available on IREPS

[Procedure for Prototype and Sample approval](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/uploads/Procedure%20for%20Prototype%20and%20Sample%20Approval%20Rev_02_01112023.pdf) 

 **Information regarding CCA by RITES**

[Format](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/uploads/Format%20for%20application.pdf) of application for CCA

List of [documents](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/uploads/List%20of%20documents.pdf) **(Annexure-II)** to be submitted by firm to RITES for scrutiny

List of M&P,QAP and Testing Requirements ( [**Annexure-III A**](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/uploads/annexure-iia.pdf))

Format of [assessment report](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/uploads/CCA%20Report%20Format.pdf) to be submitted by RITES

RITES Contact Details:   Sh Ashwini Kumar- JGM-NRIO

MOB no- 8770140003 Email ID- [ashwanikumar@rites.com](mailto:riteshparihar.78@rites.com)

[Time line for carrying out CCA by RITES](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/uploads/45%20days%20CCA%20Policy%20%2005052022\(1\).pdf)

**QAP Related Information**

1\. [Guidelines for Preparing QAP](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/uploads/Guidelines%20for%20preparing%20QAP.pdf)

2\. [Format of QAP](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/uploads/Format%20of%20QAP.pdf)
